verses.text: Numei pilte in innsung nuntakna khangsak a, numei haite in innsung susia hi
Thumanin a gamta mite in Topa zahtak uh a, a sia-in a gamta mite in Topa simmawh uh hi
Mihaite a pau ciangin siatna thuaklawh uh a, mipilte' pauna in siatna ding pan pengsak hi
Bawngtal om kei leh lo panin an tawm bek kila a, bawngtal tha tawh an a kihau ahi hi
A citak teci in thuman bekbek gen tawntung a, a ginalo teci in zuau bekbek gen tawntung hi
Mi a simmawh theite in pilna a zon' uh hangin ngah zolo uh a, thungaihsun theite in olno takin ngah thei uh hi
Mihaite tawh kikhawl kei in; amau' kiang pan pilna na ngah kei ding hi
Thungaihsun theite a pilna in lampi man musak a, mihaite a haina in lam khialsak hi
Mihaite in a khialh hangun phamawh salo uh a, mipilte a khialh ciangun mawhmaisak ding deih uh hi
Lungdamna leh lungkhamna eimah bek in i theih hi a, midang kuamah in hong phawkpih khalo hi
Migilote' inn kisusia ding a, thuman mite' inn kipin gina semsem ding hi
Mihingte in thuman lampi hi, ci-in a ngaihsutte pen sihna lampi hikha thei hi
Nuihna pen cihmawh selna zong hithei a, kigualnop sakna a ven' ciangin dahna hong kilangkik hi
Misia in siatna thaman ngah a, mipha in phatna thaman ngah hi
Mihaite in a thuzak peuh um pahpah a, mipilte in a gamtatna ding ngaihsun cian hi
Mipilte kidawmin siatna panin kihem a, mihaite in thu ngaihsun masa loin gamta pahpah hi
A lungtom mite hai gamtat a, mipilte lungduai hi
Mihaite in haina bek mah ngah a, mipilte in pilna mah ngah thuah hi
Migilote in mihoihte mai-et uh a, maipha a piak ding uh a thum uh hi
Kuamah in mizawngte ngailo a, mihaute in lawm tampi nei hi
Mizawngte a simmawhte a khial hi a, mizawngte tungah a cinghte a lungdam hi
Na a hoih a semte mite in muangin zahtak a, a sia gamtatna pen khialhna lianpi ahi hi
Gimpi-a nasepna pen hauhna hi a, kam bek pau-in tutmawkna pen zawn'na ahi hi
Pilna pen mipilte' minthan'na lukhu hi a, haina pen mihaite' kizepna bulpi ahi hi
Thutak a gen teci in nuntakna huzo a, zuauthu a gen teci in mi lehhek hi
Topa a zahtak mi in lungmuan'na nei a, a tate' belhtheih ding mi kician ahi hi
Topa zahtakna pen nuntakna tuinak tawh kibang a, sihna thang tawh hong kipelhsak hi
Mi tampi a uk kumpipa minthang a, a uk ding mi om kei leh a mawkna ahi hi
A lungduaite mipil hi a, lungtomna pen haina kilatna ahi hi
Lungnopna in pumpi cidamsak a, hazatna pen guh a muatsak natna ahi hi
Mizawngte bawlsiatna pen a piangsak Pasian simmawhna hi a, mizawngte tungah citna pen Pasian zahtakna ahi hi
Migilopa ama tatsiatna in puksak a, mihoihpa ama hoihtatna in hu hi
Thungaihsun theite' sungah pilna teng a, mihaite in pilna thei khalo uh hi
Thumanna in minam minthangsak a, mawhna in minam mindaisak hi
A hoihin a gamta a mite tungah kumpipa lungdam a, a gina-in a gamta lote gim a pia hi.
